LanguageData.KT_AG_TANK.label: "Tsunami" Light Anti-gravity Unmanned Tank
LanguageData.KT_AG_TANK.description: A light anti-gravity vehicle developed and equipped by a certain Pact Nation. It is not slowed down by any terrain, equipped with a powerful triple-shot rapid-fire main cannon, though its close-defense firepower is limited to a single light machine gun.
LanguageData.KT_AG_TANK.tools.Trample.label: Trample
LanguageData.KT_AG_TANK_LMG.label: "Wave" Light Machine Gun
LanguageData.KT_AG_TANK_LMG.description: Light machine gun with limited lethality, but better than nothing.
LanguageData.KT_AG_TANK_LMG.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: Trample
LanguageData.KT_AG_TANK_Turret.label: "Howler" 105MM Main Cannon
LanguageData.KT_AG_TANK_Turret.description: Light tank main cannon capable of triple-shot rapid fire with powerful firepower.
LanguageData.KT_AG_TANK_Turret.tools.Trample.label: Trample
LanguageData.KT_AG_TANK_Turret.verbs.Verb_Shoot.label: Trample
LanguageData.KT_Bullet_AG_TANK_LMG.label: "Wave" Light Machine Gun
LanguageData.KT_Bullet_AG_TANK_Turret.label: "Howler" 105MM Main Cannon
LanguageData.Proj_KT_AGT_AP.label: Armor-Piercing Shell
